core_principles: Authority & Clarity: Information must be objective, readable at a glance in harsh environments.
Action-Oriented: Minimal cognitive load; highlight only what needs input or validation.
Industrial Aesthetics: Sharp corners, bold monospace IDs, high contrast, clean white cards on light gray backgrounds.
Safety First: Emphasize Pass/Fail states explicitly with stark red/green contrast.

layout_rules: Use SafeAreaView for all top-level screen components.
Maintain a 16px horizontal margin for all main content containers.
Card items must have at least 16px internal padding.
Input fields must have 48px minimum height for tap accessibility.
Form layouts must be single-column to prevent horizontal scrolling and ensure field clarity.

orders_tab.card_details: Displays WO-YYYY-NNNN (e.g. WO-2024-0012) in Roboto Mono / Accent Orange, Customer Name, Paint Product Chip, 'INSPECT' CTA.

features: 6-Stage Pipeline List (Surface Prep -> Primer Coat -> Mid-Inspection -> Top Coat -> Curing -> Final QC)
Stage Status Badges (DONE, PENDING, IN-PROGRESS, FAIL)
Environmental Conditions Block (Auto weather fetch + Manual surface temp). Must show start/end reading pair for both.
Gate Check Alert: Surface Temp > Dew Point + 3°C (Shows PASS or FAIL badge). If fail, prevent submission.
Measured Parameters Block: Surface Profile in µm (with spec range hint).
Measured Parameters Block: DFT in µm with Min & Max limits. HARD-BLOCK (disable submit/show error) on Max exceedance.
Start/End Reading Toggle (Tab or segmented control) to log twice per stage.
Photo Capture dashed dropzone (Max 5 photos) with thumbnail strip.
Sticky Bottom Primary CTA: SUBMIT INSPECTION

data_model_enforcements.environmental_pairs: Weather and Surface Temp MUST have separate UI blocks. Each block must have inputs for Start and End readings.
data_model_enforcements.dft_hard_block: Dry Film Thickness requires both MIN and MAX thresholds. If input > MAX, trigger inline error state and disable submit button.

backgrounds.description: Manufacturing plant worker background, useful for login screen top half or empty states
Industrial metal tools, useful as thumbnail for live feed

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React Native mobile app using Expo. Use StyleSheet for styles instead of Tailwind CSS.

Follow the specified color palette strictly. Backgrounds should be light gray (#F3F4F6) with white cards and dark navy text. The primary brand CTA should be black (#0A0A0A). IDs should be colored #D97706.
Borders must be sharp (borderRadius: 2 or 0) across all cards to maintain the brutalist/industrial theme.
Typography: Use Roboto Mono (or similar available monospace font) for all labels, IDs, and numeric data to ensure tabular alignment and technical aesthetic.
Input Layouts: Labels above inputs, large minimum heights (48px) for touch targets.
Gate Check Validation: Implement logic for `Surface Temp > Dew Point + 3°C`. Render a visible 'PASS' or 'FAIL' pill in the UI.
DFT Validation: Ensure Dry Film Thickness accepts input, compares against a defined min/max, and hard-disables the Submit button if max is exceeded.
Use the exact Work Order ID format WO-YYYY-NNNN globally.
Display Surface Profile in µm, not MM.
Render start/end pairs for Weather and Surface Temperature as explicit form controls (or via a tab/segmented control toggling between Start and End readings).
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, list items).
Use standard React Native components (View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, SafeAreaView, etc).
